is.t: Er. Sanjay Babu CEng(I) B.E, Mtech (NITK), A.M.I.E Registered Valuer with Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (IBBI)[Under Companies Act-2013, Reg.No. IBBI/RV/11/2022/15183] Chartered Engineer (India)[Reg.No. AM-1997338] Engineer-A[Reg.No. E-11153/19/EA-4212/KLM] GSTIN:32BXZPB7614J1Z5 HSN/SAC Code: 997224
To assess fair market value for collateral security
Date of inspection and valuation report
S. No., Plot No. and C.T.S. No.
Mode of transport to the property
Jurisdiction / Local Municipal body / Town Planning / Development Authority Area / Panchayat
Approvals for drawings from mun. authorities / occupation certificate. ULC clearance /F.S.I. available and balance for future use / F.S.I from T.D.R

Whether property falls in the list published by M/C for unauthorized properties
Whether property was identified on our own
Whether property was identified on our own
If No, your representative was accompanied with customer / Sales
If No, your representative was accompanied with customer / Sales
North side is demarcated with bio-Fencing, East side is demarcated with bio-fencing, South side is demarcated with bio-fencing, West side is demarcated with bio-fencing
Geo positioning of the property (latitude & longitude)
Any immediate repairs required with cost of the same
Any immediate repairs required with cost of the same
No. of floors for building and additional structures:
No. of lifts with capacity and type
No. of lifts with capacity and type
Type of underground, overhead tanks and pumps
Flooring in open spaces / stilts and staircase
Other amenities and special amenities and features
No. of flats on each floor
No. of flats on each floor
Details for the property under reference:
Details for the property under reference:
Balconies to rooms separate or merged
Balconies to rooms separate or merged
Flooring in toilets / W.C. / bath, dado
Toilets plumbing lines concealed/Open type of plumbing & sanitary Fittings,any special fittings.
Electrical installation open or concealed wiring Type of switches tel. Points, T.V / cable points
Risk of demolition (Valuers views) (Low, medium, high)
Risk of demolition (Valuers views) (Low, medium, high)
In case the property has mixed use, define the area being used for purpose
In case the property has mixed use, define the area being used for purpose
Is the mixed use of the property permitted or is it unauthorized
Assumptions, data available and basis- for the purpose of valuation.
Present condition of property and structure
Market rates of land for similar properties in the vicinity and surrounding area (as inquired from local estate agents)
Valuation of the property – (a) For Ready Properties -
Valuation of the property – (a) For Ready Properties -
In view of the data available and basis for valuation, the valuation of the property under reference will as under –
In view of the data available and basis for valuation, the valuation of the property under reference will as under –
Area of property (Permitted as per FSI/building byelaws)
Area of property (Permitted as per FSI/building byelaws)
Land area as per Deed/Sale Agreement

Total Value of Building (A+B+C) (Approved Plan Area)
If Under construction (then mention the level of construction / Slab)
If Under construction (then mention the level of construction / Slab)
Is the estimate given by customer valid or not (HL - Self construction)
Is the estimate given by customer valid or not (HL - Self construction)
Area of property (Permitted as per FSI/building byelaws)
Area of property (Permitted as per FSI/building byelaws)
Land area as per Sale Agreement
Total Value of Building (A+B) (As per the plan)
I have no direct or indirect interest in the property valued
Information furnished in the report is true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief
Ownership papers / Sale deed may please be verified at your end to ascertain the right title & areas

Fair market value indicated in the report is an opinion of the value prevailing on the date of the said report and is based on market feedback on values of similar properties. Client is free to obtain other independent opinions on the same. Fair, market value of such properties / localities may increase or decrease, depending on the future market conditions & scenarios. Report does not certify or confirm any ownership or title of the property that has been valued.
No structural survey was conducted by us
Validity of this report is for 90 days from date
Based on my appraisal and analysis, it is my considered opinion that the current market value of the aforesaid property, considering its prevailing condition and the specified specifications, is

c.f: CONCATENATE("The distress sale value of the property is assessed to be 80% of Rs. ",Q300," equals to Rs. ",ROUND(Q300*80%,0))
CONCATENATE("I have deputed my representative ", '101.Vlook Up'!D170, " to inspect the property, who has personally inspected the property on ", TEXT(W16, "dd-mm-yyyy"))

is.t: I hereby declare that I am not affiliated with the client/owner or any associated companies, nor have I had any direct or indirect involvement with the borrower in the past or present. I assert that this report has been prepared by me with the utmost professional integrity.
The value of a property is influenced by the specific purpose of its valuation. Therefore, the client is advised to utilize this report solely for the specified purpose.
